message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 分页查询运单时序图

participant "Query Request" as QR
participant "TradeBillController" as TBC
participant "TradeBillService" as TBS
participant "TradeBillGoodsService" as TBGS
participant "LossesService" as LS

QR -[dashed]-> TBC : **1** 发送 分页查询条件
TBC -[dashed]-> TBC : **2** checkPageQueryParams() 校验分页查询参数
TBC -[dashed]-> TBS : **3** pageData() 调用运单分页查询方法
TBS -[dashed]-> TBC : **4** 返回运单分页数据
TBC -[dashed]-> TBGS : **5** countByTradeBillId() 统计单条交易单的商品信息集合
TBC -[dashed]-> LS : **6** countByTradeBillId() 统计单条交易单的挂账信息集合
TBC -[dashed]-> TBC : **7** generateTradeBillData() 将查询数据整合
TBC -[dashed]-> QR : **8** 返回查询结果

@enduml
```
